basics.name: Nirina Ramamonjisoa
basics.label: Web Developer & IT Support | Hybrid Profile | Remote from France & Mauritius
basics.summary: Hybrid web development and IT support profile, with over 15 years of experience across varied technical environments. Autonomous in building web applications and websites (Astro, Nuxt, Tailwind CSS) and managing projects end to end: PostgreSQL databases, hosting on Linux VPS, deployment with Docker and Dokploy, Git versioning. Solid experience in user support, system administration and tool migrations. Regular use of AI tools for development, automation and technology watch. Available for remote work from France or Mauritius.

work.name: Tech In France
work.summary: Training as an application developer, then in cybersecurity, alongside operational duties: Microsoft 365 administration and AI-assisted development of internal tools (vibe coding).
responsibilities: Administration of the Microsoft Office 365 environment (users, licenses, services)
AI-assisted development of internal tools (vibe coding)
Training as an application developer, then in cybersecurity

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Autonomous design and development of web applications and websites, with an AI-assisted workflow: equipment catalog, CRM, planning calendar, address geolocation map with photos, interactive CV redesign.
achievements: Development of an equipment catalog (most polished project)
Several applications deployed in private environments
responsibilities: Design and development of web applications (Astro, Nuxt, HTML/CSS, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript)
AI-assisted development (LLM / prompting)
PostgreSQL database modeling and management
Hosting and deployment on Linux VPS with Dokploy and Docker
Versioning with Git and GitHub

work.name: EY
work.summary: Management of EY France's high-level corporate switchboard (via Phone Régie), with a key role in training and in the transition to remote work.
achievements: Took part in pre-production UAT testing during the migration to Attendant Pro
Contributed to the transition to a fully remote switchboard
responsibilities: Management of a high-level corporate switchboard (EY France)
Proficiency with call management and customer relationship tools
Training of new switchboard operators and deputizing for the manager

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Design of websites for craftsmen and e-commerce shops (including Eden Service Pro).
responsibilities: Design of websites for craftsmen and e-commerce shops
Creation of graphic assets (banners, logos, icons)
HTML and CSS integration, first steps with JavaScript

work.name: Collège Paul Éluard
work.summary: Student supervision and mentoring, homework help and management of relations with families.

work.name: Comité de Construction Régional
work.summary: IT infrastructure maintenance and administration, with on-site and remote user support.
responsibilities: Workstation maintenance and administration (Windows XP/7, Active Directory, updates, backup, antivirus)
Installation and management of temporary networks on construction sites (switches, Wi-Fi, cabling, connection sharing)
Workstation cloning and deployment
On-site and remote user support (hotline and troubleshooting)

work.name: Netvibes
work.summary: Integration and graphic design for Netvibes Universes, in a startup environment on a platform with a worldwide audience (direct competitor of iGoogle).
achievements: Contributed to a world-scale web platform, direct competitor of iGoogle
Experience in a fast-growing startup environment
responsibilities: Development of Netvibes Universes (widget-based custom mini-sites)
HTML/CSS integration and creation of graphic assets (banners, icons)
Team collaboration on a large-scale project
Use of Subversion (version control) and macOS

work.name: Numericable
work.summary: Testing and validation of information system updates in pre-production, notably the CRM managing TV/Internet offers.
responsibilities: Testing and validation of IS updates in pre-production (CRM, TV/Internet offers)
Writing test plans and reporting bugs
Verification of new offers and features before release
Database queries (SQL) for data control

work.name: Ed L'épicier
work.summary: Migration and standardization of a fleet of around 80 workstations across the Paris and Marseille sites, and preparation of the Active Directory rollout.
achievements: Migration and standardization of a fleet of about 80 workstations (Paris and Marseille)
responsibilities: Workstation migration to Windows 2000
Preparation of the Active Directory deployment plan
Standardization of workstations and servers (NetBIOS naming)
Rollout of updates and fleet maintenance
On-site work at the Marseille site to bring systems into compliance

projects.name: Portfolio & Interactive CV
projects.description: Interactive CV with color themes, dark mode and print optimization, deployed at nirina.rmnjs.org

projects.name: FDHN
